title: Mayor Zohran Mamdani Seemingly Confirms Date of Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce’s NYC Wedding
summary: "We are used to big events," the politician teased in a city press conference.
body: Most people’s weddings don’t make it onto the radar of a city’s mayor, but Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are not most people. And in a press conference on Monday (June 15), Mayor Zohran Mamdani seemingly confirmed reports that the couple will tie the knot in New York City on Fourth of July weekend while discussing public safety amid major events. Related Here’s Everything We Know About Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce’s Wedding So Far The Absolute Best Taylor Swift Songs to Use for the First Dance at Your Wedding: Staff Picks Taylor Swift Says Travis Kelce’s Proposal Was a ’10 Out of 10,’ Says Wedding Will Be ‘Fun’ To Plan While addressing reporters, the progressive NYC mayor was asked about his plans to ensure a safe environment on July 5, when FIFA is set to take over Met Life Stadium in nearby East Rutherford, N.J., for a match. “I am fully confident in the work of the NYPD as well as our state partners in delivering that safe experience,” Mamdani said. “We are the biggest city in the country. We are used to big events and we are incredibly excited for this one.” “We know it …

title: Traveling abroad with T-Mobile? Your per-minute call rates could soon jump
summary: T-Mobile gets ready to hike international voice roaming pricing by 100%.
body: TL;DR T-Mobile subscribers can roam internationally while paying $0.25 a minute for voice calls. Some subscribers now report receiving notices that rates are going up to $0.50 a minute. The new pricing is supposed to go into effect on June 25. When you’re travelling internationally, and want to make sure your phone will keep you connected, you basically have two options: temporarily get yourself an international SIM (or eSIM) , or rely upon your existing carrier’s international roaming support. While that latter option might involve making the least effort, it can also prove surprisingly expensive — and it’s only getting more so for T-Mobile users. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?

title: Google Fi gets 5 travel upgrades, including upgraded Pixel network switching
summary: Ahead of the summer travel season, Google Fi Wireless is boosting its international capabilities across five areas.
